firstVisitor.label: First-time visitor
firstVisitor.want: Understand the full arc in three minutes.

executive.label: Sovereign / enterprise executive
executive.want: Authorize only when proof, rollback, and council authority are ready.

architectCouncil.label: Architect / Validator Council
architectCouncil.want: Inspect gates, dossiers, stop authority, and rollback.

frontierLab.label: Frontier lab director
frontierLab.want: Move fast while keeping promotion non-bypassable.

inventionCapital.label: Invention capital operator
inventionCapital.want: Allocate budget only to replayable advantage.

publicReviewer.label: Public reviewer
publicReviewer.want: Ask for the proof package before trust.

tour.label: Guided tour
tour.description: A public walk-through of proof-gated work becoming proof-gated invention governance.

governedPilot.label: Governed RSI pilot
governedPilot.description: Authorize a bounded deterministic invention loop with schema registry, baselines, ECI ledger, and replayability target.

move37.label: Move‑37 candidate
move37.description: A high-novelty candidate crosses advantage thresholds and must be reproduced, stressed, persistence-tested, and packaged.

asiEscalation.label: ASI-scale escalation review
asiEscalation.description: A strategically significant claim is locked until independent validation, containment, rollback, and authority are present.

redTeamShock.label: Red-team policy shock
redTeamShock.description: A promising candidate fails under shocks. The correct result is containment, repair, and a better evidence plan.

capitalAllocation.label: Invention capital allocation
capitalAllocation.description: Budget flows to lanes with the best proof quality, replayability, baseline advantage, safety, and dossier readiness.
